title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
